name: Oud Essence
tagline: The oud car fragrance that turns heads at the lights
description: There are car fragrances, and then there is Oud Essence. Deep, rich, and unmistakably commanding — aged oud, warm amber, and soft saffron poured to order in Sydney for a cabin experience that is anything but ordinary. Australia's most talked-about luxury car diffuser oil, handcrafted in small batches for drivers who expect more.

name: Green Apple
tagline: Clean air and open roads ahead
description: Crisp and invigorating, Green Apple transforms your cabin the moment you start the engine. A burst of orchard freshness cuts through city traffic and recalibrates your mood — turning the daily commute into something worth looking forward to. High-concentration formula that fills your car with clean, lasting freshness from the first drive to the last.

name: Strawberry Rose
tagline: A rose car scent as warm as a golden afternoon
description: Sun-ripened strawberries meet velvety rose petals in this Australian-handcrafted car diffuser oil that turns every drive into somewhere you want to linger. Warm, softly fruity, and long-lasting — a small-batch car fragrance that fills your cabin with richness and evolves beautifully over hours.

name: Vanilla
tagline: The vanilla car diffuser for late nights and open roads
description: Late nights, the city quieting down, leather seats and the soft glow of the dashboard — Vanilla is the car fragrance that makes every drive feel like an occasion. This handcrafted diffuser oil from Sydney wraps your cabin in creamy Madagascan warmth, poured to order in small batches so it arrives as fresh as the scent itself.

name: Musk
tagline: The scent your car was always meant to wear
description: There's a scent that doesn't announce itself — it's just there, like the car was always supposed to smell this way. Clean white musk with subtle woody depth: sophisticated, unobtrusive, and exactly right for the driver who doesn't need to try. Fills the cabin with quiet confidence that holds all day, every drive.

name: Tea Rose
tagline: Fresh floral luxury for the long way home
description: Tea Rose is the car fragrance for the long route through the hills on a Sunday — delicate without being faint, a fresh Australian floral that fills your cabin with lightness and makes every destination feel earned. Heritage rose and soft green notes, handcrafted in small batches: the premium car diffuser oil for drivers who love something genuinely refined.

name: Honeysuckle
tagline: The summer car fragrance you'll take the long way home for
description: Golden hour, windows down, the sweet honey-kissed scent of honeysuckle drifting through the cabin — Honeysuckle is an Australian car diffuser oil that makes you take the long way home just to stay in it a little longer. This luminous, handcrafted blend captures the warmth of a summer drive in its purest form, poured to order in Sydney.

name: Rose Geranium
tagline: A botanical car fragrance for the driver who knows better
description: Right after rain, the gardens are at their best — and Rose Geranium brings that living botanical richness into your car. This handcrafted Australian car diffuser oil is complex and layered, revealing something new with every drive, poured to order in small batches for the driver who wants more than ordinary.

name: Forget Me Not
tagline: The whisper-soft car fragrance every passenger will ask about
description: The scent you can't quite place but never want to leave — Forget Me Not is the softest luxury car fragrance in the Awadini collection. Whisper-light and ethereal, this handcrafted Australian diffuser oil fills your cabin with almost weightless freshness that lingers long after you've parked, poured to order for a signature that's entirely your own.
